companyName.en: Tencent Games — Heima Private Domain Project
companyName.zh: 腾讯游戏 · 黑马私域项目

summary.en: Late-2023 retrospective of the Heima sub-team's WeChat private-domain operations playbook within Tencent Games — repositioned from selling a platform to selling outcome accompaniment, with measurable success rates lifted from the industry's <20% to 40–50%. Includes a BMC, VPC, design-criteria canvas, and experiment canvas, plus a long-form narrative tying them together.
summary.zh: 2023 年底对腾讯游戏黑马团队微信私域运营项目的复盘:从“卖平台”转向“卖效果陪伴”,把行业里 < 20% 的成功率拉到 40–50%。包含商业模式、价值主张、设计准则、实验四张画布,以及一篇贯通的长篇叙事。

sources.label: Internal retrospective by sibo (Tencent Games · Heima), recorded December 2023
